caption:
You didn't lose that job to a better contractor.

You lost it to whoever called back first. Reputation gets the phone to ring. Speed decides who answers it.

Lead response research consistently shows under 20% of businesses respond to a new lead within an hour, and responding within 5 minutes nearly doubles the close rate.

Test it this week: have a friend or family member submit a lead through your form or call your main line like a real customer. Time the response, start to finish. If it's over 5 minutes, that gap is where the job is being lost.

Want response speed built into every channel?
DM SCALE

#HomeServices #LeadResponse #FieldService #BusinessGrowth #BlackArrow
rationale: Fills the under-served Contrarian/Brand POV category with a sharp, unclaimed reframe (craftsmanship/reputation isn't the deciding edge, response speed is), and reels still carry the strongest reach plus the top-weighted 2026 DM-share signal for this kind of point-of-view content.
